customers_say: Customers find the water purifier delivers good water quality and works well, with quick and perfect installation by Aquaguard experts. The product receives positive feedback for its taste, elegant design, value for money, and ease of use, with one customer noting the convenient tap design for one-handed water collection. The service aspect receives mixed reviews, with some praising the excellent service while others report poor service experiences.

reviews.author: Harini Kapila
reviews.title: Good water filter with 12 stages
reviews.body: Service is good, tank fills quickly and water wastage is less. Dont have to change Filter till 10 K Liters is more exciting for me

reviews.author: Gautham skoyal
reviews.title: Hey
reviews.body: Working good and fine ... installation was smooth and the product looks classy ..water feels premium

reviews.author: Vidya
reviews.title: Good
reviews.body: It looks good. Product is good

reviews.author: saurabh k.
reviews.title: Aquaguard review
reviews.body: Satisfied and good response. The person who came to install was also humble.
